findings.name: 명도 대비
findings.issue: text-zinc-400 (#9F9FA9) on white (#FFFFFF) — contrast ratio 2.62:1 (requires 4.5:1 for 12px normal text). Affects: date display (data-testid="current-date"), notification timestamps (<time> elements). On alternating blue-tinted row (bg #EFF6FF), ratio drops to 2.41:1.
findings.fix_guide: Use text-zinc-600 (#52525C, 7.72:1) or at minimum text-zinc-500 (#71717B, 4.83:1) for sufficient contrast on both white and tinted backgrounds.

findings.name: ARIA 상태 변경
findings.issue: hamburger-menu button (aria-label="메뉴 열기") lacks aria-expanded attribute. Clicking the button does not toggle any ARIA state (aria-expanded, aria-pressed, etc.), so assistive technology cannot convey the menu's open/closed state. Additionally, icon-only buttons btn-refresh and btn-settings have no aria-label, making their purpose inaccessible.
findings.fix_guide: Add aria-expanded="false" to the hamburger button and toggle it to "true" when the mobile nav is open. Add descriptive aria-label attributes to btn-refresh (e.g., "새로고침") and btn-settings (e.g., "설정").
